untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'major news event' (not in allowed indicators) and measurement of standard deviations from 'pre-news level' (requires external news data and baseline establishment logic not available in price/technical indicators). Approximated with volatility spike (true_range > atr_14) and reversal momentum (close crossing prev_close), but this does not capture the core news-event-driven reversion mechanism specified in the original signal.
translation_notes: Entry conditions use true_range spike as proxy for overreaction (0.75-1.0 stddev equivalent), and directional close reversal from extreme. Exit uses pivot (rational repricing level) and 1.5 ATR stop loss as specified. Context-dependent direction based on reversal direction. HIGH_VOL regime filter applied. This is a partial translation—true implementation requires external news event detection.
